notes: Cross-session memory for AV Intelligence Digest Agent v5.0. Read at session start (Task 0). Written back at session end (Task 7). Schema v2.0 adds source_failures, company_tracking, consecutive_no_change_days, conflict_age_days.

ongoing_stories.headline: China nationwide AV permit freeze
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active - Day 38 as of June 6, 2026. No resumption timeline confirmed. Cooling-off restricts newly-added vehicles through at least end of June. Three joint-ministry stress tests mandated. Existing permitted services continue. Conflict escalated to HIGH PRIORITY (conflict_age_days = 7).
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: Outage trigger date disputed: March 31, 2026 (EVWire/CarNewsChina/CNBC, Score: 3) vs April 27, 2026 (Bloomberg/Automotive World, Score: 3). Working conclusion: April 27 system-wide event triggered April 29 MIIT freeze; March 31 was precursor. ESCALATED to HIGH PRIORITY.
status_change_triggers: Official MIIT or Ministry of Transport announcement on resumption or extension
Any operator receiving a new AV permit
Any official timeline given or revised
Any additional operator sanctioned or penalized
Official Baidu statement confirming outage trigger date

ongoing_stories.headline: Apollo Go outage trigger date - March 31 vs April 27 conflict
ongoing_stories.last_status: Unresolved as of June 6, 2026. No new official Baidu/MIIT statement. Working conclusion: April 27 system-wide event triggered April 29 MIIT freeze; March 31 was Wuhan-only precursor.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: March 31 cited by EVWire/CarNewsChina/CNBC (Score: 3). April 27 cited by Bloomberg/Automotive World (Score: 3). No official resolution. LOW PRIORITY.
status_change_triggers: Official Baidu statement confirming or clarifying the date
Regulatory document from MIIT citing a specific date
Third-party credible investigation finding

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo NHTSA recall - 3,791 vehicles, flooding defect
ongoing_stories.last_status: Open - Day 25 as of June 6, 2026. Permanent remedy still in development. Interim OTA fix deployed. San Antonio and Atlanta paused.
status_change_triggers: Permanent fix submitted to or approved by NHTSA
Recall scope expanded or narrowed
NHTSA closes or escalates the investigation
San Antonio or Atlanta operations formally resumed

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo freeway ride suspension - construction zone edge cases
ongoing_stories.last_status: Ongoing Day 16 as of June 6, 2026. All freeway rides suspended. Surface streets operational. Root cause not disclosed. No resumption date given.
status_change_triggers: Official freeway resumption announced
Suspension extended to additional cities
Root cause publicly disclosed
Software fix confirmed deployed via OTA

ongoing_stories.headline: Apollo Go Wuhan service shutdown - ongoing post-outage
ongoing_stories.last_status: Still shut down as of June 6, 2026 (Day 67+, Day 11 without change). No official resumption. HIGH PRIORITY conflict.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: Registry/Automotive World/CNBC: service shut down since April 1 (Score: 4). China Survival Kit tourist guide (unverified): service operational (Score: 0). No official resumption found. HIGH PRIORITY.
status_change_triggers: Official Apollo Go or Baidu announcement of Wuhan service resumption
Regulatory approval granted for Wuhan operations to restart
Credible Tier 1-3 source confirming service operational status

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo Ojai - US Senate scrutiny of Zeekr/Geely manufacturing partnership
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active as of June 6, 2026 (Day 5 without change). No new Senate action. Senator Moreno criticism remains last known development.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: Senate hearing date unconfirmed - LOW PRIORITY.
